meaning: n.(某些环节动物的)疣足 (软体动物的)侧足
examples: The adhesion platelets of PLGA coating were more, and some platelets deformed and the parapodium stretched out.
The adhesion platelets of PLGA coating were more, and some platelets deformed and the parapodium stretched out;
In the last 6 months my husband has bought a Parapodium for me to walk in.
